annotations
  • we don't look for com.github.googlei18n.ufo2ft.featureWriters key: https://github.com/googlefonts/fontc/issues/1868
  • we create useless variation tables sometimes: https://github.com/googlefonts/fontc/issues/1860
  • (to add or change, manually edit annotations.json)
